README and project instructions updated.

Phase 1 complete: Architecture, stack, foundations, and project setup established.

Phase 2 complete: Tool layer implemented (stock price, fundamentals, calculator, news) with clean schemas, rule-based agent router, and live data integration tested. 27 tests passing, Streamlit app responds to stock queries with grounded answers and tool traces.

Phase 3 complete: RAG pipeline implemented (document loading, chunking, embeddings, FAISS vector store, retriever, persistence tests) with finance sample docs and teaching module.

Phase 4 complete: LangGraph-based agent orchestration implemented with stateful planning, multi-tool routing, company-name resolution, real GDELT news integration, retrieval-backed grounding, and synthesis fallback. 39 tests passing.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
